mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgency}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND procurement_work_area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{procurementWorkArea}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND public_procurement_category_mid = #{publicProcurementCategoryMid}
AND public_procurement_category = #{publicProcurementCategory}
AND first_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT contract_delivery_integrated_no AS contractDeliveryIntegratedNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, contract_type AS contractType, procurement_work_area AS procurementWorkArea, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, initial_year_contract_no AS initialYearContractNo, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, representative_item_category_code AS representativeItemCategoryCode, representative_item_category AS representativeItemCategory, detail_item_code AS detailItemCode, public_procurement_category AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_category_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS contractDate, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(completion_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completionDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, contract_amount AS contractAmount, latest_change_seq AS latestChangeSeq, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM service_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_delivery_integrated_no, vendor_biz_reg_no LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT contract_delivery_integrated_no AS contractDeliveryIntegratedNo, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, contract_type AS contractType, procurement_work_area AS procurementWorkArea, bid_notice_no AS bidNoticeNo, initial_year_contract_no AS initialYearContractNo, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, representative_item_category_code AS representativeItemCategoryCode, representative_item_category AS representativeItemCategory, detail_item_code AS detailItemCode, public_procurement_category AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_category_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, DATE_FORMAT(first_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS firstContractDate, DATE_FORMAT(contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS contractDate, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(completion_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completionDate, first_contract_amount AS firstContractAmount, contract_amount AS contractAmount, latest_change_seq AS latestChangeSeq, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM service_contract_flat
ORDER BY contract_date DESC, contract_delivery_integrated_no, vendor_biz_reg_no
mapper.sql:
WHERE is_active = 'Y'
AND demand_agency LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgency}, '%')
AND demand_agency_region LIKE CONCAT('%', #{demandAgencyRegion}, '%')
AND procurement_work_area LIKE CONCAT('%', #{procurementWorkArea}, '%')
AND contract_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractMethod}, '%')
AND public_procurement_category_mid = #{publicProcurementCategoryMid}
AND public_procurement_category = #{publicProcurementCategory}
AND initial_contract_date = #{firstCntrctDate}
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{month}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{month}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND initial_contract_date >= CONCAT(#{rangeStart}, '-01') AND initial_contract_date < DATE_ADD(CONCAT(#{rangeEnd}, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
AND saved = 'Y'
mapper.select:
SELECT group_key AS groupKey, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, procurement_work_area AS procurementWorkArea, public_procurement_category AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_category_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initialContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS initialContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmountSum, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM service_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, group_key, vendor_biz_reg_no LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT group_key AS groupKey, vendor_biz_reg_no AS vendorBizRegNo, vendor_name AS vendorName, contract_title AS contractTitle, demand_agency AS demandAgency, demand_agency_region AS demandAgencyRegion, contract_method AS contractMethod, procurement_work_area AS procurementWorkArea, public_procurement_category AS publicProcurementCategory, public_procurement_category_mid AS publicProcurementCategoryMid, DATE_FORMAT(initial_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initialContractDate, initial_contract_amount AS initialContractAmount, DATE_FORMAT(final_contract_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS finalContractDate, final_contract_amount_sum AS finalContractAmountSum, contract_count AS contractCount, is_long_term AS isLongTerm, IFNULL(saved, 'N') AS saved FROM service_contract_grouped
ORDER BY initial_contract_date DESC, group_key, vendor_biz_reg_no
